name: k8s-hpa-vs-vpa
description: Use the web_search tool to search for 'Kubernetes HPA vs VPA comparison'. Then use the web_search tool to search for 'Kubernetes pod autoscaling best practices 2025'. Both will return overlapping docs about HPA, VPA, and KEDA. List overlapping URLs. Use summarize on them. Log the decision criteria to your learnings. Save as k8s-scaling.md with cited URLs.
